response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified two songs based on on-screen text and audio: 'Bremen' by Yorushika and 'Kanade' by Sukima Switch.
2. Identified performers: Otonose Kanade (blonde) and Nerissa Ravencroft (dark hair).
3. Simplified search queries to: '"ブレーメン" ヨルシカ Japanese and English lyrics' and '"奏" スキマスイッチ Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Successfully located lyrics for both songs. Structured the output into two scenes representing the two songs.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Otonose Kanade and Nerissa Ravencroft. The video features a performance of 'Bremen' by Yorushika, followed by a guitar-accompanied performance of 'Kanade' by Sukima Switch.

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade and Nerissa Ravencroft performing 'Bremen' by Yorushika. Text #音乃瀬奏生誕祭2025 appears in the corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねぇ考えなくてもいいよ
口先じゃ分かり合えないの
この音に今は乗ろうよ
忘れないでいたいよ
身体は無彩色 レイドバック
ただうねる雨音でグルーヴ
ずっと二人で暮らそうよ
この夜の隅っこで
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, it’s fine if you don’t think about it
We can’t really understand each other just with words
Let’s just ride this sound for now
I want to remember this
The body is achromatic, laid-back
Just grooving with the undulating sound of the rain
Let’s live together forever
In the corner of this night

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade performing 'Kanade' by Sukima Switch on acoustic guitar. Text '奏 (かなで)' and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
改札の前 つなぐ手と手
いつものざわめき 新しい風
明るく見送るはずだったのに
うまく笑えずに君を見ていた
君が大人になってくその季節が
悲しい歌で溢れないように
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hands joined in front of the ticket gate
The usual bustle, a new breeze
I was supposed to see you off cheerfully
But I couldn't smile well and just looked at you
So that the season when you become an adult
Won't be filled with sad songs
